action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed 10 epochs with best dev EER of 0.0035 on ASVspoof 2019 LA. Each epoch takes ~7.4 minutes. The key challenge is generalization to the 2021 LA eval set which has codec degradation (a-law, G.722, GSM, OPUS) and unseen attacks. Analysis: The dev EER is very low on clean data, but the test set has codec-degraded audio. The most impactful improvement would be adding codec simulation augmentation during training to improve robustness. I should also unfreeze more WavLM layers for better adaptation. Decision: Submit current best model for evaluation to get a baseline test score, then iterate with codec augmentation and other improvements.
